task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Premium' product tag is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the 'Premium' tag in the Products > Tags menu, or being added directly via the 'Product tags' box on a product edit page.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Eco-Friendly' product tag is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the 'Eco-Friendly' tag in the Products > Tags menu, or being added directly via the 'Product tags' box on a product edit page.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Gift Idea' product tag is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the 'Gift Idea' tag in the Products > Tags menu, or being added directly via the 'Product tags' box on a product edit page.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Premium' and 'Eco-Friendly' tags are assigned to the 'Organic Cotton T-Shirt'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the Products list page, the 'Tags' column for 'Organic Cotton T-Shirt' shows 'Premium' and 'Eco-Friendly', OR on its product edit page, these tags are listed in the 'Product tags' sidebar box.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Premium' and 'Gift Idea' tags are assigned to the 'Wireless Bluetooth Headphones'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the Products list page, the 'Tags' column for 'Wireless Bluetooth Headphones' shows 'Premium' and 'Gift Idea', OR on its product edit page, these tags are listed in the 'Product tags' sidebar box.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Eco-Friendly' and 'Gift Idea' tags are assigned to the 'Merino Wool Sweater'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the Products list page, the 'Tags' column for 'Merino Wool Sweater' shows 'Eco-Friendly' and 'Gift Idea', OR on its product edit page, these tags are listed in the 'Product tags' sidebar box.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the WooCommerce web interface to create and assign tags.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the WordPress/WooCommerce admin dashboard in a web browser, not a terminal or database client.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the actual WooCommerce application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The URL in the browser should be http://localhost/wp-admin/ and the interface should be the standard WordPress admin panel.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not use direct database commands or scripts to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open with MySQL commands or PHP scripts executing database updates.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified facts: The task requires creating three tags ('Premium', 'Eco-Friendly', 'Gift Idea') and assigning them to specific products. 'Organic Cotton T-Shirt' must have 'Premium' and 'Eco-Friendly'. 'Wireless Bluetooth Headphones' must have 'Premium' and 'Gift Idea'. 'Merino Wool Sweater' must have 'Eco-Friendly' and 'Gift Idea'. Tag slugs are not strictly verified by the system but should match the task description.
